DefaultBodyText.SourceString: We have found multiple Fortnite Crew subscriptions associated with your account, and have issued 1,500 V-Bucks for each extra subscription per billing period. We recommend cancelling the extra Fortnite Crew subscriptions by following the relevant instructions.
